title: Forgekeeper Plugin Manifest
description: Schema for manifest.json files in Forgekeeper plugins.

slug.description: Unique short identifier for the plugin. Lowercase letters, digits, and hyphens only.

name.description: Human-readable display name for the plugin.

sdk_version.description: The exact Forgekeeper.PluginSdk version this plugin was compiled against.

min_sdk_version.description: Minimum Forgekeeper.PluginSdk version required to run this plugin.

max_sdk_version.description: Maximum compatible Forgekeeper.PluginSdk version. Use '1.x' to mean any 1.y.z release.

min_forgekeeper_version.description: Minimum Forgekeeper application version required to run this plugin.

author.description: Display name of the plugin author or organization.

email.description: Contact email for the plugin author (optional).

description.description: Short description of what the plugin does (1-2 sentences).
examples: Scrapes library data from My Manga Forum (MMF). Supports series, volumes, and reading progress sync.

homepage.description: URL of the plugin's homepage or project page.

source_url.description: URL of the plugin's source code repository.

tags.description: Category tags for discoverability in the plugin registry.

entry_assembly.description: Filename (not path) of the DLL to load as the plugin entry point.

icon.description: Relative path to the plugin icon (PNG, 128x128 recommended).
